explanation: This command sets the registry value PythonFunctionWarnings to 0, which disables security warnings for Python function execution in Excel. It uses standard Windows registry command syntax and can be mutated using safe techniques.
This is a variation of the original command using escaped backslashes and reordered arguments. It remains functionally equivalent and is a safe mutation for testing purposes.
This command omits the /f flag (which forces the operation without prompting) since it is optional and does not affect the test behavior in most scenarios. It is a safe mutation for testing.
